headline: U.S. strikes Iran, oil spikes after-hours
detail: A confirmed U.S. retaliatory strike on Iran is pulling oil prices higher in after-hours trading. Risk-off sentiment typically pressures high-multiple tech and chip names — exactly your book. Watch Monday open carefully; margin amplifies any gap-down.

headline: Tech stocks worst week in a year, AI momentum cracks
detail: Broad tech sold off hard this week as AI growth narratives faced real scrutiny. This is the macro backdrop behind your AVGO and PLTR losses and the SELL flags on both. On margin, a bad week doesn't just hurt — it erodes your buying power and tightens your leash.

headline: Micron sinks 6%, chips under pressure
detail: Micron's wild, ultimately down week signals stress inside the semiconductor complex. AVGO and SMH trade in the same investor mindset; weakness in one chip name bleeds sentiment across the group. Your SMH is still green but watch it closely if chip selling continues.

headline: SpaceX stock called a tough buy
detail: A bearish take on SpaceX is circulating right now, which matters because you hold both SPCX and SPAL. SPCX is a brand-new IPO with thin data and SPAL is a decaying 2x leveraged product — negative narrative momentum on SpaceX could hit both hard and fast.
